title: BFA Industrial Design Senior Show
description: Celebrate the graduating Industrial Design Class of 2026—a cohort of 15 emerging designers. Their thesis projects reflect the range of industrial design today: medical devices, housewares, consumer electronics, furniture, and lighting. Grounded in research and brought to life through prototyping, testing, and storytelling, this work reveals how emerging designers are rethinking the objects, systems, and experiences that shape everyday life.

gallery.alt: A bright orange sculptural model with curved and geometric forms sits on a light wood base in a gallery space with polished floors.
Wooden chairs and a table are repurposed as planters with grass and flora growing from their seats at a gallery installation exploring nature and function.
Visitors examine a gallery space featuring wooden geometric sculptures and architectural models displayed on white pedestals.
A large circular wooden sculptural installation features geometric patterns, carved elements, and various hand-crafted wooden pieces arranged in a mandala-like composition.
A close-up of hands using wooden tools to interact with a collection of textured, carved ceramic or wooden sculptural forms displayed at eye level.
